section_miscategorizations.text: She is 21 months old and her twin is a girl who is about a pound heavier and slightly shorter.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Age and anthropometric comparison between twins are objective demographic/physical details rather than patient-reported symptoms or history; however, this does not substantially mislead clinical interpretation.

section_miscategorizations.text: Katherine is a 22-month-old female with Smith-Magenis syndrome, potentially affecting the kidneys and urinary tract.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The diagnosis of Smith-Magenis syndrome is an established condition and fits better as an objective problem list item; its presence in the assessment is acceptable but slightly blurs the distinction between existing diagnoses (O) and interpretive synthesis (A).
